question_text: A light wave has a frequency of 5.0 × 10¹⁴ Hz. Using the relationship between frequency and colour, which colour is this light most likely to be? (Hint: Red light has a frequency around 4.3 × 10¹⁴ Hz and violet light around 7.5 × 10¹⁴ Hz)
explanation: The frequency of 5.0 × 10¹⁴ Hz falls between red (4.3 × 10¹⁴ Hz) and violet (7.5 × 10¹⁴ Hz). It is closer to red, so the light would appear orange or red-orange. Higher frequency means shorter wavelength and colour shifts towards violet.
